visuals.title: Memory Paging - Address Translation and Page Tables
visuals.description: Animated visual covering logical-to-physical address translation, page table mapping, TLB lookup, internal fragmentation, and key paging formulas.
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="400" data-topic-id="paging">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bgGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E8EAF6"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#C5CAE9"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowIndigo" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="6" refX="8" refY="3" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L8,3 L0,6 Z" fill="#3949AB"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="arrowTeal" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="6" refX="8" refY="3" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L8,3 L0,6 Z" fill="#00695C"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="arrowOrange" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="6" refX="8" refY="3" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L8,3 L0,6 Z" fill="#E65100"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="420" height="400" fill="url(#bgGrad)" rx="12"/>

  <!-- ========== GROUP 1: Title (0.3s) ========== -->
  <g data-narration="Memory Paging divides logical memory into fixed-size pages and physical memory into frames of the same size." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="24" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="16" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Memory Paging</text>
    <line x1="120" y1="30" x2="300" y2="30" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>

  <!-- ========== GROUP 2: Address Translation (1.5s) ========== -->
  <g data-narration="A logical address is split into a Page Number and an Offset. The page number indexes the page table to get a frame number. The physical address is formed by combining the frame number with the offset." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>

    <!-- Section label -->
    <text x="15" y="50" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Address Translation</text>

    <!-- Logical Address box -->
    <rect x="15" y="55" width="175" height="28" fill="white" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.5" rx="4"/>
    <text x="22" y="73" font-family="monospace" font-size="9" fill="#3949AB">Logical:</text>
    <line x1="72" y1="56" x2="72" y2="82" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="2,2"/>
    <rect x="73" y="57" width="55" height="24" fill="#E8EAF6" rx="2"/>
    <text x="100" y="73" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Page #</text>
    <rect x="130" y="57" width="55" height="24" fill="#C5CAE9" rx="2"/>
    <text x="157" y="73" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Offset</text>

    <!-- Arrow down from Page # to Page Table -->
    <line x1="100" y1="83" x2="100" y2="94" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrowIndigo)"/>

    <!-- Page Table mini box -->
    <rect x="70" y="95" width="60" height="20" fill="#3949AB" rx="3"/>
    <text x="100" y="109" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" font-weight="bold">Page Table</text>

    <!-- Arrow from page table to frame number -->
    <line x1="130" y1="105" x2="148" y2="105" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrowIndigo)"/>
    <text x="165" y="109" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#3949AB" font-weight="bold">Frame #</text>

    <!-- Physical Address box -->
    <rect x="220" y="55" width="185" height="28" fill="white" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.5" rx="4"/>
    <text x="227" y="73" font-family="monospace" font-size="9" fill="#3949AB">Physical:</text>
    <line x1="290" y1="56" x2="290" y2="82" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="2,2"/>
    <rect x="291" y="57" width="55" height="24" fill="#E8EAF6" rx="2"/>
    <text x="318" y="73" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Frame #</text>
    <rect x="348" y="57" width="52" height="24" fill="#C5CAE9" rx="2"/>
    <text x="374" y="73" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Offset</text>

    <!-- Arrow connecting logical to physical -->
    <path d="M190,69 Q205,69 220,69" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowIndigo)"/>

    <!-- Formula -->
    <text x="312" y="100" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#3949AB">PhysAddr = Frame x PageSize + Offset</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ========== GROUP 3: Page Table Diagram (3.0s) ========== -->
  <g data-narration="The page table maps each logical page to a physical frame. Page 0 maps to Frame 5, Page 1 to Frame 8, Page 2 to Frame 1, and Page 3 to Frame 3." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>

    <!-- Section label -->
    <text x="15" y="130" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#00695C">Page Table Mapping</text>

    <!-- Logical Pages (Left side) -->
    <text x="38" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="#00695C" font-weight="bold">Logical</text>
    <rect x="15" y="148" width="46" height="18" fill="#B2DFDB" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1" rx="2"/>
    <text x="38" y="161" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#00695C">Page 0</text>
    <rect x="15" y="167" width="46" height="18" fill="#B2DFDB" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1" rx="2"/>
    <text x="38" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#00695C">Page 1</text>
    <rect x="15" y="186" width="46" height="18" fill="#B2DFDB" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1" rx="2"/>
    <text x="38" y="199" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#00695C">Page 2</text>
    <rect x="15" y="205" width="46" height="18" fill="#B2DFDB" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1" rx="2"/>
    <text x="38" y="218" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#00695C">Page 3</text>

    <!-- Page Table (Center) -->
    <text x="120" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="#00695C" font-weight="bold">Page Table</text>
    <rect x="90" y="148" width="60" height="18" fill="#00695C" rx="2"/>
    <text x="120" y="161" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="white">0 -> 5</text>
    <rect x="90" y="167" width="60" height="18" fill="#00897B" rx="2"/>
    <text x="120" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="white">1 -> 8</text>
    <rect x="90" y="186" width="60" height="18" fill="#00695C" rx="2"/>
    <text x="120" y="199" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="white">2 -> 1</text>
    <rect x="90" y="205" width="60" height="18" fill="#00897B" rx="2"/>
    <text x="120" y="218" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="white">3 -> 3</text>

    <!-- Arrows from logical to page table -->
    <line x1="61" y1="157" x2="88" y2="157" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrowTeal)"/>
    <line x1="61" y1="176" x2="88" y2="176" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrowTeal)"/>
    <line x1="61" y1="195" x2="88" y2="195" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrowTeal)"/>
    <line x1="61" y1="214" x2="88" y2="214" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrowTeal)"/>

    <!-- Physical Frames (Right side) -->
    <text x="208" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="#00695C" font-weight="bold">Physical Memory</text>
    <rect x="178" y="148" width="60" height="14" fill="#E0F2F1" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="208" y="159" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#00695C">Frame 0</text>
    <rect x="178" y="162" width="60" height="14" fill="#80CBC4" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="208" y="173" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#00695C" font-weight="bold">Frame 1 (P2)</text>
    <rect x="178" y="176" width="60" height="14" fill="#E0F2F1" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="208" y="187" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#00695C">Frame 2</text>
    <rect x="178" y="190" width="60" height="14" fill="#80CBC4" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="208" y="201" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#00695C" font-weight="bold">Frame 3 (P3)</text>
    <rect x="178" y="204" width="60" height="14" fill="#E0F2F1" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="208" y="215" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#00695C">Frame 4</text>
    <rect x="178" y="218" width="60" height="14" fill="#80CBC4" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="208" y="229" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#00695C" font-weight="bold">Frame 5 (P0)</text>
    <rect x="178" y="232" width="60" height="14" fill="#E0F2F1" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="208" y="243" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#00695C">Frame 6</text>
    <rect x="178" y="246" width="60" height="14" fill="#E0F2F1" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="208" y="257" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#00695C">Frame 7</text>
    <rect x="178" y="260" width="60" height="14" fill="#80CBC4" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="0.5" rx="1"/>
    <text x="208" y="271" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#00695C" font-weight="bold">Frame 8 (P1)</text>

    <!-- Arrows from page table to specific frames -->
    <path d="M150,157 C165,157 170,229 178,229" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowTeal)"/>
    <path d="M150,176 C165,176 170,271 178,271" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowTeal)"/>
    <path d="M150,195 C165,195 170,169 178,169" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowTeal)"/>
    <path d="M150,214 C165,214 170,197 178,197" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowTeal)"/>
  </g>

  <!-- ========== GROUP 4: TLB (4.5s) ========== -->
  <g data-narration="The Translation Lookaside Buffer is a fast hardware cache for recent page table entries. On a TLB hit, the frame number is retrieved instantly. On a TLB miss, the page table in memory is accessed and the TLB is updated." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="4.5s" fill="freeze"/>

    <!-- Section label -->
    <text x="265" y="130" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#E65100">TLB (Translation Lookaside Buffer)</text>

    <!-- CPU box -->
    <rect x="265" y="137" width="40" height="22" fill="#E65100" rx="4"/>
    <text x="285" y="152" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" font-weight="bold">CPU</text>

    <!-- Arrow CPU to TLB -->
    <line x1="305" y1="148" x2="320" y2="148" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrowOrange)"/>

    <!-- TLB box -->
    <rect x="322" y="137" width="38" height="22" fill="#FF8F00" rx="4"/>
    <text x="341" y="152" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" font-weight="bold">TLB</text>

    <!-- HIT path (fast) -->
    <line x1="360" y1="148" x2="375" y2="148" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrowOrange)"/>
    <rect x="377" y="137" width="32" height="22" fill="#4CAF50" rx="4"/>
    <text x="393" y="149" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="white" font-weight="bold">HIT</text>
    <text x="393" y="157" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6" fill="white">fast!</text>

    <!-- MISS path (down) -->
    <line x1="341" y1="159" x2="341" y2="172" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="355" y="169" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#C62828" font-weight="bold">MISS</text>

    <!-- Page Table lookup on miss -->
    <rect x="305" y="173" width="72" height="18" fill="#E65100" rx="3"/>
    <text x="341" y="186" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="white">Page Table</text>

    <!-- Arrow back up: update TLB -->
    <path d="M377,182 C395,182 395,148 360,148" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="1" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="3,2" marker-end="url(#arrowOrange)"/>
    <text x="400" y="170" font-family="Arial" font-size="6" fill="#E65100">update</text>

    <!-- Access counts -->
    <text x="275" y="205" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#E65100">HIT:  1 memory access</text>
    <text x="275" y="215" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#C62828">MISS: 2 memory accesses</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ========== GROUP 5: Internal Fragmentation (6.0s) ========== -->
  <g data-narration="Internal fragmentation occurs because the last page of a process may not completely fill the allocated frame, wasting some space within that frame." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="6.0s" fill="freeze"/>

    <!-- Section label -->
    <text x="15" y="245" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828">Internal Fragmentation</text>

    <!-- Frame box (full size) -->
    <rect x="15" y="252" width="140" height="40" fill="white" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="1.5" rx="3"/>

    <!-- Used portion -->
    <rect x="16" y="253" width="95" height="38" fill="#FFCDD2" rx="2"/>
    <text x="63" y="276" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="#C62828" font-weight="bold">Used (last page)</text>

    <!-- Wasted portion -->
    <rect x="112" y="253" width="42" height="38" fill="#EF9A9A" rx="2" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="0.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>
    <text x="133" y="271" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#C62828" font-weight="bold">Wasted</text>
    <text x="133" y="281" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="6" fill="#C62828">space</text>

    <!-- Label -->
    <text x="15" y="303" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#C62828">Last page may not fill entire frame</text>
    <text x="15" y="313" font-family="Arial" font-size="7" fill="#555">Avg waste = half a page per process</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ========== GROUP 6: Key Formulas (7.5s) ========== -->
  <g data-narration="Key paging formulas: Page size equals 2 to the power n. Number of pages equals logical address space divided by page size. Physical address equals frame number times page size plus offset." opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="7.5s" fill="freeze"/>

    <!-- Section label -->
    <text x="185" y="245" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Key Formulas</text>

    <!-- Formula background -->
    <rect x="185" y="252" width="220" height="80" fill="white" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.5" rx="5" opacity="0.9"/>

    <!-- Formula 1 -->
    <circle cx="198" cy="268" r="4" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="207" y="271" font-family="monospace" font-size="9" fill="#3949AB" font-weight="bold">Page size = 2^n</text>

    <!-- Formula 2 -->
    <circle cx="198" cy="288" r="4" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="207" y="291" font-family="monospace" font-size="9" fill="#00695C" font-weight="bold"># Pages = logical_space / page_size</text>

    <!-- Formula 3 -->
    <circle cx="198" cy="308" r="4" fill="#E65100"/>
    <text x="207" y="311" font-family="monospace" font-size="9" fill="#E65100" font-weight="bold">Phys addr = frame x page_size + offset</text>

    <!-- Formula 4 -->
    <circle cx="198" cy="325" r="4" fill="#C62828"/>
    <text x="207" y="328" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#C62828">Effective Access Time:</text>

    <!-- EAT formula -->
    <text x="215" y="340" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#555">EAT = hit_ratio x TLB_time + (1 - hit_ratio) x mem_time</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Bottom border accent -->
  <rect x="0" y="394" width="420" height="6" fill="#3949AB" rx="0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="8.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
</svg>

diagrams.title: Paging Address Translation
diagrams.description: Logical to Physical address conversion via page table lookup

steps: Extract page number p from logical address
Look up page table[p] to get frame number f

diagrams.title: TLB Address Translation
diagrams.description: Fast path (TLB hit) vs slow path (TLB miss) for address resolution

fast_path: HIT: Get frame number directly from TLB
slow_path: TLB MISS: page not found in TLB
Access page table in main memory
Get frame number from page table entry

diagrams.title: Page Table Mapping
diagrams.description: Pages mapped to non-contiguous frames in physical memory

data.note: Pages need not be contiguous in physical memory. Frame allocation is managed by the OS free-frame list.
